details: The agent successfully visited all three sites and reported correct information: (1) Wikipedia - correctly identified Graydon Hoare as the designer, found via page text stating 'Software developer Graydon Hoare created Rust in 2006'; (2) GitHub - correctly reported ~112k stars from the repo-stars-counter-star element; (3) rust-lang.org - correctly reported the tagline 'A language empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software.' All three sites were actually browsed with browser automation tools, and the answers match the known facts.
